title: OFSI General Licence INT/2025/8257372
body: " OFSI General Licence INT/2025/8257372 OFSI General Licence INT/2025/8257372 Publication notice   On 19 December 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/8257372 under regulation 44 of The Myanmar (Sanctions) Regulations 2021 (the “Myanmar Regulations”) and under regulation 20 of The Global Human Rights (Sanctions) Regulations 2020 (“the Global Human Rights Regulations”) pertaining to humanitarian activity in Myanmar.  "
